THE VESSEL TO HAVE THE LIBERTY OF USING LSMGO FOR EXCHANGING BALLAST WATER
AT SEA,STARTING/STANDBY/STOPPING ENGINES, WHILE MANEUVERING IN
SHALLOW/NARROW WATERS, CANALS, RIVERS, IN/OUT OF PORTS AND DURING POOR
VISIBILITY AND ALSO DURING MAINTENANCE WORKS, NARROW/CONFINED WATERS ETC.
THE VESSEL WILL CONSUME ADDITIONAL VLSFO WHEN
BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/BALLAST EXCHANGING/HOLD CLEANNING ETC.

ALL ABOVE SPEED/CONSUMPTIONS ARE GIVEN UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITION AND
CLEAN BOTTOM, SMOOTH SEA, WITH BEAUFORT SCALE MAX WIND FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS
SEA STATE 3 (THREE, I.E. THE SUM OF WAVE + SWELL HEIGHT UP TO 1.25
METERS),NO ADVERSE CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL. EXTRAPOLATION
OF $B!H(BGOOD WEATHER$B!I(B PERFORMANCE FOR $B!H(BBAD WEATHER$B!I(B PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED.

INSPECTED AS PER ISO 8217-2017.

BUNKER QUALITY
ISO F-8217:2017 RMG380 FOR VLSFO
ISO F-8217:2017 LSMGO TO APPLY
CHARTERERS TO COMPLY WITH FUEL SULPHUR CONTENTS AS PER LATEST REQUIREMENTS
OF MARPOL ANNEX VI.
VESSEL ONLY HAVE ONE MGO TANK AND CAN'T SEPARATE, OWNERS WILL AGREE MIXING
LSMGO WITH WHICH ALREADY ON BOARD.
VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO CONSUME DIESEL OIL BY BOTH M/E AND A/E WHENEVER VESSEL
ENCOUNTER HEAVY SEA / SEVERE WEATHER CONDITIONS, MANEUVERING, IN/OUT OF
PORTS, NAVIGATING IN SHALLOW / RESTRICTED / BUSY /CONGESTED WATER, CANALS
AND RIVERS, STARTING/ STOPPING OF A/E, BURNING OF SLUDGE OIL BY INCINERATOR,
DURING LOW LOAD OR UNSTEADY LOADING OPERATION OF A/E.
VSL WILL BURN ADDITIONAL 2MT LSFO PER DAY WHEN HEAVY BALLASTING
/DEBALLASTING.
GOOD WEATHER CONDITION IN THS C/P SHALL MEANS ALL WEATHER CONDITONS NOT
EXCEEDING WIND FORCE BEAUFORT FOUR, DOUGLAS SEA STATE THREE, NO ADVERSE
CURRENT AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL.THE VESSEL'S PERFORMANCE SHALL
ONLY BE ASSESSED ON THE BASIS OF ITS PERFORMANCE IN GOOD WEATHER AS DEFINED
IN THIS DESCRIPTION. WHERE CHARTERERS PROVE THAT AN UNDER-PERFORMANCE HAS
OCCURRED DURING A GOOD WEATHER PERIOD, ANY CLAIMS ARISING THEREFROM SHALL BE
RESTRICTED TO THAT GOOD WEATHER PERIOD ONLY, AND NO CLAIMS WHATSOEVER MAY BE
BROUGHT FOR UNDERPERFORMANCE, LOSS OF TIME, OR OVER-CONSUMPTION DURING
PERIODS OF TIME THAT ARE NOT GOOD WEATHER PERIODS.
